channel.title: Code Reels - Interview Questions
channel.description: Master technical interviews with 71 questions across 8 channels. System design, algorithms, frontend, backend, DevOps, and more.

item.title: algorithms - 4 Questions
item.description: Practice 4 interview questions in algorithms. Difficulty breakdown: 0 beginner, 2 intermediate, 2 advanced.

item.title: backend - 9 Questions
item.description: Practice 9 interview questions in backend. Difficulty breakdown: 2 beginner, 3 intermediate, 4 advanced.

item.title: behavioral - 12 Questions
item.description: Practice 12 interview questions in behavioral. Difficulty breakdown: 7 beginner, 4 intermediate, 1 advanced.

item.title: database - 7 Questions
item.description: Practice 7 interview questions in database. Difficulty breakdown: 0 beginner, 2 intermediate, 5 advanced.

item.title: devops - 11 Questions
item.description: Practice 11 interview questions in devops. Difficulty breakdown: 2 beginner, 3 intermediate, 6 advanced.

item.title: frontend - 8 Questions
item.description: Practice 8 interview questions in frontend. Difficulty breakdown: 3 beginner, 1 intermediate, 4 advanced.

item.title: generative-ai - 9 Questions
item.description: Practice 9 interview questions in generative-ai. Difficulty breakdown: 3 beginner, 3 intermediate, 3 advanced.

item.title: system-design - 11 Questions
item.description: Practice 11 interview questions in system-design. Difficulty breakdown: 5 beginner, 3 intermediate, 3 advanced.
